base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_1_2_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Underground overworld — dark-blue sky palette, brick-ceiling + brick-floor, rows of coins, Piranha-plant pipes. Secret warp-zone pipes at end lead to world 2/3/4.. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Underground overworld — dark-blue sky palette, brick-ceiling + brick-floor, rows of coins, Piranha-plant pipes. Secret warp-zone pipes at end lead to world 2/3/4.
